CustomField.description: Total effective discount across all QLIs, expressed as a percentage (0-100). Calculated by the Quote trigger from per-QLI Discount values weighted by UnitPrice × Quantity. Distinct from the standard Quote.Discount field (which is per-quote and applies to the whole subtotal).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Weighted average discount % across line items. Trigger-maintained.
CustomField.label: Total Discount Percent
